parameters-en.Key: Selects the key of the harmony.
parameters-en.Shift: Sets the interval of the harmony, from a 9th below to a 9th above.
parameters-en.Scale: Selects the scale of the harmony.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the effected signal and the dry signal. At 0%, no effected signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
